elements.original_description: A person stands with their arms outstretched, releasing a glowing coin-shaped object into the air. The coin radiates golden light and sparkles as it floats upward. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Cinematic high-quality photograph of a person, their face filled with a sense of release, standing with arms outstretched upwards, releasing a glowing coin-shaped object. The coin radiates brilliant golden light and sparkles as it floats upward into the air. Soft, ethereal cinematic lighting with a slight lens flare, high resolution, dramatic shallow depth of field. Pure background, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
